title: Unique Silky Greek Oreo Cream Biscuits Gyro
description: A malty and silky Greek dish featuring Oreo cream biscuits in a gyro form, cooked in a Dutch oven to perfection, this diabetic friendly treat is a nostalgic dream come true.
instructions: Preheat the Dutch oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the crushed Oreo cream biscuits, Greek yogurt, honey, malt powder, and char-grill yang sauce until well combined.
Stir in the lemon zest and vanilla extract.
Spoon the mixture onto the pita bread pieces, leaving a small border around the edges.
Roll up the pita bread pieces to form gyros.
Place the gyros in the preheated Dutch oven and cook for 10 minutes.
Remove the gyros from the Dutch oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the Unique Silky Greek Oreo Cream Biscuits Gyro warm and enjoy.
